heading: “United States” defined
label: 1514 “United States” defined
text: Unless otherwise indicated, as used in this section [, 1513–1515, 1517] the term “United States” means the several States the District of Columbia, and the territories and possessions of the United States.150 U.S.C. 1512See References in Text note below.1
